title.rendered: My First Video Ever! Road-tripping the Algarve in Portugal!

content.rendered:
If you follow me on Instagram, you know that I recently visited Portugal. Ashley(featured here) and I decided to rent a car and visit the Algarve region. The beaches in this area were so beautiful and we had the most amazing time. I’ll do a blog post detailing this adventure soon, but for now I’ll leave you with a video. 

This is the first video I’ve ever created and I hope you enjoy it. I can’t wait to make more! If you want to see more, be sure to leave a comment and let me know!
